name: dzienniczek-hormonu
description: Dzienniczek Hormonu - PWA i natywna aplikacja Android WebView

scripts.prepare:web: npm run build:sources && npm run build:bridge && node tools/run_python.js tools/prepare_android_web.py
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run format:check
scripts.lint:js: eslint app.js service-worker.js src/native tests tools eslint.config.cjs prettier.config.cjs
scripts.test:settings: node tools/run_python.js tests/settings_stage9_test.py && node tests/settings_navigation_runtime_test.js && node tests/permissions_onboarding_runtime_test.js
scripts.test:final: node tools/run_python.js tests/final_matrix_test.py && node tests/final_states_runtime_test.js && npm run test:migrations && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:accessibility
scripts.test:web: npm run lint && npm run test:project && npm run test:architecture && npm run test:visual && npm run test:today && npm run test:calendar-history && npm run test:profile-stats && npm run test:settings && npm run test:notifications && npm run test:pwa-stage11 && npm run test:final && npm run test:pwa && npm run test:backup && npm run test:security && npm run test:webview
scripts.test: npm run prepare:web && npm run test:web && npm run test:android
